block.rsrreforged.crafting_emitter.toolt: Emits a Redstone Signal when the specified amount of an item/fluid is being processed.
block.rsrreforged.requester.tooltip: Keeps a specified amount of an item/fluid in stock.

block.rsrreforged.crafting_emitter.toolt: The resources that should emit a redstone signal
